{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20874_1
|class_id=20874
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=collection@20874_2
|fame=15
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=32
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +2<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +4<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss4=Snail HP +300<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20
|ss7=Snail HP +300<br>Per Minigame installed, Snail DEF +6<br>Minigames Installed: 20/20<br> (Awakened)
}}
